Teaching & Mentorship

Experience & Supervision

12+ Years

Total Teaching Experience in Mechanical Engineering.

16+ Projects

Supervised 12+ B. Tech projects and 4 M. Tech dissertations.

  • • Fluid Mechanics
  • • Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD)
  • • Heat and Mass Transfer
  • • Thermodynamics
  • • ANSYS Documentation & Courses
  • • Aerodynamic Design of Vehicle
  • • Engineering Graphics
  • • Engineering Design and Prototype (SOLIDWORKS)
  • • 3D Printing
  • • Workshop Practice
  • Implementing OBE: Proper mapping of course outcome to program outcome.
  • Blooms Taxonomy: Systematic approach for teaching and assessment.
  • PBL Mode: Teaching subjects through Project Based Learning (e.g., Fluid Mechanics).
Details Organized By Date
5 days STTP on CFD GU-SME Skill Development Training, Galgotias University Jan 2021
IFDP ON TRENDS IN AUTOMOTIVE TECHNOLOGY (Aerodynamics) Jointly by Wollo Univ (Ethiopia), Medi-Caps, Sathyabama & Galgotias May 2021
